title: CraftsOfEgypt Genie Blown Glass Miniature Perfume Bottles for Perfumes & Essential Oils, Set of 10 Decorative Vials, Each 2" High (5cm), Assorted Colors
description:
About this item
Handmade in Egypt: Forget mass-produced imitations. Our gorgeous glass genie bottles are mouth-blown, one by one, by skilled Egyptian craftsmen - for heirloom quality at an affordable price.
No Unpleasant Surprises: Every handcrafted vial is unique. But we take care to ensure that your complete set closely resembles our product pictures - same fanciful shapes & rich, luminous colors.
Perfect Size for Perfumes & Essential Oils: At about 2" high (5cm), each decorative bottle holds the ideal amount of fragrance. (Use the matching handcrafted top as an elegant applicator.)
Securely Packaged for Safety: No worries. These elegant vials are carefully packed & wrapped, so all will arrive safe and sound. (If they don't, we'll provide free replacements.)
Many usages : victorian tear catcher bottle , wine genie , apothecary bottles , apothecary jars colored , antique apothecary bottles, perfume bottle fan . Tear catchers and tear vial , glass vapor genie , holy water bottle empty , genie jewelry . ornate perfume bottle , eid decorations for home , wholesale perfume sale ,frasco para perfume
reviews_5s: So delicate but pretty. They Hold diamond drills to commemorate diamond paintings that I have finishedThese are beautiful, very detailed and tiny. Most are more than 2” high but still gorgeous!Love the colors and the craftsmanship Great jobThese are a great, unique collection of decorative perfume bottles! They arrived quickly, they were well packed and none were broken. They are mostly taller than most collections in this category, and very stately.I purchased these miniature Perfume Bottles as memory gifts for a funeral service. I needed something pretty, memorable, good-looking, exotic and dramatic. These blown glass miniatures fit all of those requirements. they really are pretty and they are individually wrapped so there is no chance of breaking. They come together in a nice box with cotton padding and each one is wrapped with foam. A rubber band holds the foam wrapping around each one. I needed something small, but not tiny. Each bottle looks great and I can see it placed on a mantle or a windowsill as a nice remembrance item. It also can hold a small amount of liquid, which means that it would work well for perfume or oils. I am very pleased with my order. I had to look at a lot of places before I found CraftsOfEgypt, but it was worth the effort.Well packaged, none is brokenarrived on schedule,as describedThese miniature bottles are delicate but beautifully made. I ordered 30 for a project and only received 26. I contacted the seller as soon as I received them and they responded immediately. They quickly sent out the missing bottles and even included an extra. All were individually wrapped, none were broken. Very impressed with the quality of the items and great customer service. This business cares about their customers. Will buy from them again.These little bottles are so cute they are way smaller than I thought and they would be perfect for perfume like their original design. The only complaint I have is that the little glass dropper dosent go down to the bottom of the bottle. I do recomend you be super careful with the droppers. My husband and I go to lots of midevil events and the packaging is amazingly nice not a single chip or bottle broken were working on getting some stalk to sell at events I'm thinking about getting a nail polish display for them I'm interested in the one that you get 50 bottles how much of a difference there is or if it's just a repeat order which wouldn't be that bad. I will deffinitly be buying more and make cute little perfume potion bottles we just so happen to make our own perfumes so this will be nice. Thanks for getting it to me so quickly. I have prime so I ordered it and the next day got it delivered. Fastest prime ever.I purchased these after I saw them in Egypt. I put different perfumes in them and gave them away as gifts. Super cute!
reviews_1s:
I thought they were going to be bigger but they were really tiny that's not what I wanted so if you buy this product please measure them before you buy them get measurements
because these are way too smallNot sure if I got a wrong set, the colors are not vivid nor are they the same bottles as shown. Only one steam will reach the bottle on one bottle all the others are broken or ???Wasn’t expecting them to break so easily, if you knock one over the top comes off, it fell 1 foot and broke. I have now accidentally broke 4 of them.Several were open when I opened the box. The rest were way way waaaaay tinier than they appear in the photos. The ones in the photos look to be about 6 inches tall, which is what the item details says. Unfortunately, 6 inches describes the box they come in- the actual bottles are miniscule. Either the woman in the photos is the tiniest person alive or the pics are photoshopped because there is no way that's a pic of these bottles with a normal sized adult. I'm very disappointed.The bottles are cute until you washed them, and yes I did "hand wash" them! I hand washed mine and the paint came off of the red, yellow, purple and blue ones!Tried to perfume in these and paint came off the bottles on my handsBottles are cheaply designed, arrived with broken stems on more than one, and pouring perfume into the bottle ate the paint off the side.

These are inexpensive decorative items and not suitable for use. Frankly, get something else.

Additionally, volume of bottle not listed but is about 7ml, which is really small.The bottles are very beautiful. However, some of them don’t sit up straight and two were broken during delivery.Used for essential oils color was wiping off right on my hands suppose.to be blown colored glass definitely not looks like bottles are dipped in dyeOrdered twice. Wrong number of bottles came, twice. Only received 9. Pretty upset about it. Would not recommend if you're wanting the listed number of bottles.
